meta.comment: v0.60 — fork of v0.59 deployed-model set. Goal: fix v0.59 routing hard agentic coding to weak models (SWE-bench Pro 8.9% / SWE-Atlas QnA 4.4% vs direct opus 21-22%). Two changes vs v0.59: (1) merge 5,820 Tier 3 SWE-bench Verified Easy solve labels into training so coding clusters get real solve-rate signal; (2) proxy claude-opus-4-8's RouterArena profile from claude-opus-4-7 so opus-4-8 has a balanced easy-prompt baseline instead of a flat global-prior backfill that otherwise makes it win every cluster. score_normalization switched minmax->zscore so opus's absolute coding margin survives instead of collapsing to per-prompt 0/1 ties.
meta.training_recipe: k=16, alpha=0.80, shrinkage_k0=10, score_normalization=zscore, output_cost_ratio=0.25, speed_weight=0.08, per_model_verbosity=true, include_aa_labels (v0.56-keyed), aa_evidence_scale=3.0. Direct labels: routerarena_labels_combined.jsonl (236k rows) + Tier 3 SWE-bench Easy shards (tier3-full-20260527 + tier3-opus48-20260529, 5820 shards). measured_speed/verbosity from tier1_20260530.json. opus-4-8 proxies opus-4-7 RouterArena column + own swebench column.

deployed_models.proxy_note: Opus 4.8 has no RouterArena/AA labels of its own; reuse Opus 4.7's RouterArena column for the easy-prompt baseline (near-identical predecessor on general prompts), while its own swebench_anthropic/claude-opus-4-8 column supplies the coding solve signal. Mirrors the glm-5.1<-glm-5 proxy pattern. Without this, opus-4-8's RouterArena column is empty and it gets a flat global-prior backfill that wins every cluster.

glm-5.2 (day-0 Fireworks) has no RouterArena labels and no AA aggregate scores yet (aa_metrics.py tops out at glm-5.1). Proxy z-ai/glm-5's RouterArena column (nearest full-coverage predecessor) for the general-prompt baseline.
minimax-m3 has no clean RouterArena labels (Fireworks rate-limited) and no AA aggregate scores (aa_metrics.py has only minimax-m2.7). Proxy minimax-m2.7's RouterArena column (immediate predecessor).
qwen3.7-plus (day-0 Fireworks) has no RouterArena labels and no AA aggregate scores. Proxy qwen3-coder-next's RouterArena column (nearest in-family proxy, same choice as v0.69).
kimi-k2.7 day-0; proxy kimi-k2.6 (predecessor); coding quality from DeepSWE prior.
